# Chapter 1: Mechanisms: linkages, cams, gears  (~120 pp)
- 1.1 Degrees of freedom, mobility (12) · 1.2 Four-bar and other planar linkages (15) · 1.3 Cams and followers (15) · 1.4 Gears: spur, helical, bevel, worm (18) · 1.5 Gear trains, ratios, efficiency (15) · 1.6 Synthesis: designing for a desired motion (18) · 1.7 Worked examples: bicycle drivetrain, watch escapement, robotic arm (15) · 1.8 Failure section: gear-tooth fatigue, backlash, linkage jam (12)

**Archetype**: control, scaling. **Project**: design and 3D-print a four-bar linkage with specified motion. **Exercises**: 40.
